25.reason: [Error: This condition checks for op==0 again, but it should check for op==-1 to detect the end of operations. This causes an infinite loop because op==-1 never matches, and the program never breaks.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: This condition checks for op==0 again, but it should check for op==-1 to detect the end of operations. This causes an infinite loop because op==-1 never matches, and the program never breaks.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition checks for op==0 again, but it should check for op==-1 to handle the end-of-operations signal. As a result, the loop never breaks when -1 is entered, causing an infinite loop (Time Limit Exceeded).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  should be op==-1 to properly break on end-of-operations
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition should be 'else if(op==-1)' to break on the end-of-operations marker. Using op==0 again makes the break unreachable, causing an infinite loop and time limit exceeded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition checks for op==0 again, which was already handled in the previous else-if block. It should check for op==-1 to break the loop. Because it never breaks on -1, the loop continues indefinitely waiting for more input or failing to terminate, causing Time Limit Exceeded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition checks for op==0 again, which was already handled in the previous else-if block. It should check for op==-1 to break the loop. Because this condition is never true (as op==0 is caught above), the loop never breaks on -1, causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition is unreachable because it duplicates the previous 'else if(op==0)' block. The intended condition should be 'else if(op==-1)' to break the loop when -1 is encountered. Because of this error, the loop never terminates on input -1, causing an infinite loop and leading to Time Limit Exceeded.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition is unreachable because it duplicates the previous 'else if(op==0)' block. The intended condition should be 'else if(op==-1)' to break the loop when -1 is encountered. As a result, the loop never terminates on input -1, causing infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.]
